series_metadata.series_description: Includes informaiton from "personal log books", "lab slips", customer names, phone numbers, site location, posted results of testing, and the type test performed, received from the EPA, ODH/RAD Health, and private sources.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office for one year, then transfer to the State Records Ctr. Maintain at the Records Center for two years, then destroy provided all audits and litigations are completed., Paper: Wastepaper
